news.headline: Report by ResearchAndMarkets.com profiles 18 South African food companies. Includes revenue, consumption, employment, prices. Covers trends like discount retail and online.
news.summary: A report titled "The Wholesale and Retail of Food in South Africa 2025" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This comprehensive report delves into the landscape of wholesale and retail of food in South Africa, encompassing data on wholesalers, retailers, informal traders, and buying groups. Key aspects covered in the report include retail, food, and wholesale revenue figures, volume metrics, consumption patterns, employment statistics, food prices, and food security concerns. Furthermore, the report analyzes major trends within the industry such as discount retail and the rise of online platforms for food sales.

news.headline: Trump reaffirms backing for crypto and stablecoin regulation amid growing concerns.

US consumers face risks as cost of living rises with job market 'cracks.' Bank of America warns of higher housing costs hitting lower-income consumers hardest; rent and mortgage payments for lower-income group up 11% in February compared to 2023 average.
news.summary: U.S. consumers are facing a financial squeeze due to higher housing costs, slower wage growth, and rising unemployment fears. Despite resilient consumer spending, concerns are rising about the sustainability of household budgets and the broader economy. Economist Joe Wadford of the Bank of America Institute highlighted the increasing financial headwinds affecting lower-income consumers. Housing costs have been a major challenge, with lower-income households experiencing an 11% increase in rent and mortgage payments compared to a 9% increase for higher-income households. This disparity suggests that lower-income individuals are being hit harder as rental increases spread to more affordable areas. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Markets rally post-FOMC, Trump speech. XRP case dropped by SEC. BTC near $88k, XRP up 10%. 200-day SMA reached. Trump Media SPAC seeking $179m. ETH to sunset testnet in Sep. Pakistan to legalize crypto. Kraken acquires NinjaTrader for $1.5bn. Privy raises $15m. MEXC launches platform. Tune in FOMO HOUR for all the latest news and updates in the crypto world. Live streaming on YouTube and X daily. #bitcoin #crypto #podcast
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) nearly reached $88,000 after the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting before dropping back; Trump is set to make a significant update on the crypto strategy; BTC bottom predicted at $77,000 by Hayes as Quantitative Tightening (QT) is over. Fear and Greed index now at 'Neutral'. XRP price surged by 10% as the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is dropping the XRP case. Bitnomial is preparing to launch regulated XRP Futures in the US. Trump Media SPAC aiming to raise $179 million for crypto ventures. Hyperliquid plans to introduce staking tiers on April 30. Ethereum (ETH) to retire 'Holesky' Testnet in September. First Solana (SOL) Futures Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) in the US set to start trading. Pakistan moving to legalize crypto. Kraken to acquire NinjaTrader for $1.5 billion. Privy secures $15 million for onboarding rules development. Founder of Gotbit to give up $23 million in crypto as fine. MEXC introducing a hybrid Centralized- Decentralized Exchange platform. Pakistan and Kraken are likely to have major impact with the rising crypto trends. Farokh, Mando, and Tyler host the FOMO HOUR, covering crypto and macro news Monday to Friday. Links to follow for more details.

news.headline: Robinhood has started accepting bets on March Madness. Will competitors follow suit?
Traders pare bets on BoE rate cut in May, see 60% chance vs 70%

Kenya Agri-business Industry Report 2024 includes competitive analysis of 32 players. Focus on livestock, crop, horticulture, dairy, tea, coffee farming and processing. Major players mentioned: Williamson Tea, Kenya Tea, Nzoia Sugar, Chemelil Sugar, Unga Group, Cargill.
news.summary: A report titled "The Agri-business Sector in Kenya 2024" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report provides insights into the agribusiness sector in Kenya, covering livestock, crop, and horticulture production. Specific focus is given to dairy, tea, and coffee farming and processing. The report delves into agriculture's economic contribution, trends, key players, corporate activities, trade dynamics, regulations, and influencing factors like the economy and environment. This comprehensive analysis serves as a valuable resource for understanding the current landscape of the agri-business sector in Kenya.

news.headline: CED reports 76% of EU adults have improper manual brushing technique, tied to preventable oral health issues.
news.summary: Ahead of World Oral Health Day on March 20, the Council of European Dentists (CED) released concerning findings from a recent study in Shenzhen, China. The research revealed that 76% of adults in the EU exhibit incorrect manual brushing techniques, a significant factor contributing to the high prevalence of preventable oral health issues. This data underscores the urgent need for improved oral hygiene education and practices among the population.

news.headline: DSV's AGM on March 20, 2025 with 1152 attendees.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases in the country has reached a record high of 10,000, with 500 new cases reported in the past 24 hours alone. Additionally, the death toll has risen to 200, with 20 new casualties reported. The government has implemented stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and limitations on social gatherings. Experts are warning that the situation is rapidly escalating and urge the public to adhere to health guidelines to prevent further transmission.

news.headline: TON Foundation secures $400M through token sale from diverse VC firms, boosting growth of TON blockchain ecosystem. Toncoin gains popularity, aiming for 30% Telegram users in 3 years. VC interest in blockchain rises, with over $1.1B in deals seen in February for DeFi and business projects.
news.summary: The TON Foundation, also known as The Open Network Foundation, has raised over $400 million in token-based investments from various venture capital firms. These firms include Sequoia Capital, Ribbit, Benchmark, Draper Associates, and others, who purchased Toncoin (TON), the native cryptocurrency of The Open Network. The TON blockchain network, originally developed by Telegram's founders, now operates independently and has seen significant growth, with 41 million native accounts and over 121 million unique Toncoin holders. TON Foundation aims to onboard 30% of active Telegram users to the blockchain in the next three years, as Telegram's user base is expected to exceed 1.5 billion by 2030. Venture capital funding in blockchain projects is also on the rise, with over $1.1 billion in deals in February, particularly in decentralized finance services. Capital is increasingly flowing into crypto and blockchain projects as they gain legitimacy, especially in sectors like asset management, transactions, and tokenization.

news.headline: CEO Knut Nesse's company, Nesse & Co AS, acquired 50,505 shares of AKVA group ASA at NOK 64.97 per share.
news.summary: Today, it was reported that Nesse & Co AS, a firm overseen by CEO and primary insider Knut Nesse, purchased 50,505 shares in AKVA group ASA at a rate of NOK 64.97 per share.

news.headline: Post Road Group gives $206M loan to Baron Property Group for Metro Parc North project in Hialeah, FL.
news.summary: A financial firm Post Road Group recently announced providing $206 million in construction financing to Baron Property Group (BPG), a real estate developer based in Miami and New York, for their new residential project, Metro Parc North, located in Hialeah, FL. The deal was facilitated by Ayush Kapahi, principal and founding partner at commercial real estate advisory HKS Real Estate Advisors. The project broke ground last month, marking the beginning of the construction process.

news.headline: Digi International announces new products: Next-Gen Digi Navigator, Digi Connect EZ with PoE.
news.summary: The city of Minneapolis witnessed the unveiling of groundbreaking enhancements by Digi International. The company introduced the next-generation Digi Navigator™ along with the latest Digi Connect® EZ featuring Power over Ethernet (PoE) technology. These innovations are set to revolutionize the industry with their advanced capabilities.

news.headline: Thailand tourism surges due to The White Lotus effect, boosting travel insurance sales.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida on March 20, 2025, Thailand has swiftly emerged as a premier global travel hotspot, largely attributed to the popularity of the HBO series The White Lotus, set in the country for its current season. Recent data comparing travel insurance highlights the surge in travel interest to Thailand.

news.headline: Thumzup Media Corp starts $1 million share buyback program to boost shareholder value. Los Angeles, March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Thumzup Media Corporation (Nasdaq: TZUP) from Los Angeles reaffirmed its dedication to increasing shareholder value and strategic capital deployment on March 20, 2025. The company, an up-and-coming player in social media branding and programmatic advertising, continues to prioritize these efforts.

news.headline: Dogfish Head offers a variety of beverages for spring, including fruity cocktails and refreshing beers.
news.summary: Dogfish Head offers a wide variety of beverages suitable for all tastes this spring and beyond. With a range that includes fruity, ready-to-drink cocktails and crisp, refreshing beers, there is something for every consumer to savor.

news.headline: Revlon appoints Ralph Marshall as Chief Information and Digital Officer, joining on April 1, 2025, reporting to CEO Michelle Peluso.
news.summary: Revlon Group Holdings LLC has appointed Ralph Marshall as Chief Information and Digital Officer, effective April 1, 2025. Reporting directly to CEO Michelle Peluso, Marshall brings a wealth of experience in various technology platforms, including emerging technologies. His strategic alignment of technology will play a crucial role within the company.

news.headline: Buckle Me Baby wins Kickfurther CPGrow '25 Pitch Competition, gets $250,000 no-cost inventory financing. Over 698 applications for event.
news.summary: In Buffalo, N.Y., Kickfurther, a prominent inventory funding platform for consumer packaged goods (CPG) firms, has revealed the champion of the CPGrow 2025 pitch contest. The event offers a platform for up-and-coming CPG brands to display their inventive products and expansion prospects annually. This year, there were over 698 applications for the competition, a substantial increase from the 2024 edition, with only 5 finalists making it to the live presentation to narrate their founder story. The judging panel evaluated their financial stability and growth potential.

news.headline: Crude oil gains over 1% as US weekly jobless claims increase; Dow up 0.63% at 42,230.78, Nasdaq up 0.81% at 17,894.89.
news.summary: Stocks in the U.S. saw gains in midday trading on Thursday, with the Nasdaq Composite rising by over 100 points. The Dow was up by 0.63% at 42,230.78, the NASDAQ climbed 0.81% to 17,894.89, and the S&P 500 increased by 0.61% to 5,710.13. Communication services shares were the top performers, rising by 1.4%, while consumer staples shares fell by 0.1%. Initial jobless claims in the U.S. rose by 2,000 to 223,000 in the second week of March. ProAssurance Corporation (NYSE:PRA) shares surged by 48% to $22.99 after it announced acquisition by The Doctors Company for $25.00 per share. Windtree Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:WINT) stocks soared by 71% to $2.8950 after a recent development.

news.headline: T-Mobile will discuss Q1 2025 results on April 24, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. Webcast registration required.
news.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMUS) will be holding a discussion about their first quarter 2025 financial and operational performance on April 24, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The call can be accessed through pre-registration for dial-in participation or via a webcast link on the Investor Relations website at https://investor.t-mobile.com. The earnings release, Investor Factbook, and other relevant materials will be released around 4:05 p.m. ET on the same day.

news.headline: Airbyte announces new features for moving data at scale for AI and analytics, ensuring governance. Protects data from leaking.
news.summary: In an announcement made today in San Francisco, Airbyte, a prominent open-source data movement platform, unveiled enhanced features to facilitate large-scale data movement for artificial intelligence (AI) and analytics tasks. These capabilities aim to improve governance and reduce the need for organizations to dedicate significant time to managing data pipelines, enabling them to harness value from their data more efficiently. Airbyte's focus is on safeguarding data to prevent unintended access by external users of AI models, ensuring data security for organizations.

news.headline: Enterprise Connect 2025 in San Francisco empowered IT professionals with strategies for enterprise communications and CX for long-term success.
news.summary: In San Francisco, the recent Enterprise Connect event gathered IT decision-makers to enhance business communications and customer experience. Themed "Charting Your Course," Enterprise Connect 2025 aimed to equip these professionals with the necessary strategies, tools, and insights to navigate technology migration and digital transformation in an AI-driven era. The event spanned three days and featured an expo showcasing the latest developments in enterprise communications and CX.

news.headline: McLean & Company emphasizes customized assessments for effective hiring, boosting success by aligning evaluations with organization needs.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by renowned HR research and advisory firm McLean & Company has revealed that enhancing pre-employment assessments can lead to a significant boost in hiring success rates. By ensuring that candidate evaluation aligns closely with organizational requirements and competencies, companies can make more informed hiring decisions. The study, based in Toronto, showed that this approach has the potential to improve hiring outcomes by up to 30%, emphasizing the importance of refining assessment processes in the recruitment phase. The research findings were released on March 20, 2025, signaling a shift towards more strategic and tailored hiring practices in response to escalating...

news.headline: Cello and Lightspeed launch GTM10 Awards to honor top Go-To-Market Operators in Software industry.
news.summary: In San Francisco, the GTM10 Awards, in collaboration with Cello and Lightspeed Venture Partners, celebrate top Go-To-Market (GTM) professionals in Customer Success, Growth, Marketing, Sales, and Partnerships within the Software sector. This is the first annual recognition program of its kind worldwide. Traditionally, startup achievements have been evaluated based on products and fundraising, yet the individuals leading GTM efforts play a crucial role in translating vision into success. The GTM10 Awards seek to highlight the impact of these leaders in the industry.

news.headline: Apple shakes up AI executive ranks in a bid to turn around Siri, removes Siri management from AI Chief John Giannandrea. Taps Vision Pro chief Mike Rockwell to run Siri Assistant. $AAPL
Inventor from Ontario creates CATCH-IT for easier dog waste disposal when walking; innovation to streamline cleanup process.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 20, 2025, an inventor from Brockville, Ontario, Canada shared his creation called the CATCH-IT. Inspired by the desire for a more practical way to clean up after dogs during walks, the inventor explained that his innovative design aims to eradicate the traditional challenges and frustrations associated with this task.

news.headline: DBX 1 to stream live on YouTube with top fighters like Yoel Romero and Andrei Arlovski, featuring media personalities for commentary.
news.summary: In Miami on March 20, 2025, the highly anticipated Dirty Boxing Championship (DBX) will debut with DBX 1 featuring renowned industry media figures such as Jason Anik, Renato Moicano, Mike Perry, Brendan Tobin, and The Schmo providing commentary. This groundbreaking combat sport event marks the first in a series, set to captivate audiences and redefine the fighting scene. Don't miss the live premiere of DBX with its lineup of media personalities, promising an electrifying experience for fans and enthusiasts alike.

news.headline: Loti AI offers free AI-powered online reputation protection and content removal once exclusive to celebrities.
news.summary: Cutting-edge digital identity protection and automated content removal services, previously only accessible to celebrities, are now open to the public at no cost. Loti AI, a prominent provider of user-centric security solutions, revealed this breakthrough on March 20, 2025, in Seattle. This initiative aims to offer everyone the opportunity to safeguard their online presence effectively.

news.headline: Noul presents AI cervical cancer screening technology at NVIDIA GTC 2025, joins HCLS ecosystem. Seeks healthcare partnerships.
news.summary: Noul Co., Ltd., a medical AI company based in South Korea, has recently joined the NVIDIA Healthcare & Life Sciences (HCLS) Ecosystem with the aim of enhancing global diagnostic accessibility. The company, headquartered in Yongin, revealed its plans on March 20, 2025. Noul Co., Ltd. is actively seeking partnerships to capitalize on global healthcare opportunities as it strives to make a significant impact in the field. This move aligns with the company's goal to leverage innovative technologies to advance healthcare worldwide.

news.headline: Long Beach Medical Center's Heart & Vascular Institute performs 1st dual chamber leadless pacemaker, led by Dr. Mark Lee.
news.summary: In Long Beach, California on March 20, 2025, the electrophysiology team at the MemorialCare Heart & Vascular Institute within Long Beach Medical Center, under the leadership of Dr. Mark Lee, successfully conducted the medical center's inaugural treatment using the AVEIR DR Dual Chamber Leadless Pacemaker System.

news.headline: Nokia updates financial data for the quarter, moving Managed Services business from Cloud and Network to Mobile Networks.
ViewSonic launches 27" 4K Dual Mode Gaming Monitor for diverse users. Ideal for gamers, streamers, and creators.
news.summary: ViewSonic Corp., a top global visual solutions provider, has released the Dual Mode Series gaming monitors on March 20, 2025 in Brea, California. Tailored for gamers, streamers, and content creators, these monitors offer adaptive performance to address the changing needs of users. With this new release, ViewSonic aims to cater to the growing market of tech enthusiasts seeking high-quality displays.

news.headline: Zealand Pharma boosts share capital through employee warrant exercises.
Arkestro appoints 2 new exec advisors to drive growth. The leading predictive procurement platform expands its board.
news.summary: A top predictive procurement platform is broadening its Executive Advisor Board to contribute to the company's strategic vision. The company, Arkestro, based in San Francisco, revealed this development on March 20, 2025. Arkestro is known for its cutting-edge Predictive Procurement Platform, which fast-tracks enterprise spend transformation. This announcement comes as two fresh members join the advisor board to bring further expertise and insights.

news.headline: 11 winners announced for 36th Annual Yamaha Young Performing Artists; exceptional talent rewarded.
news.summary: In Buena Park, California, on March 20, 2025, Yamaha revealed the 11 talented winners of the 2025 Yamaha Young Performing Artists (YYPA) Competition. This competition aims to celebrate and support extraordinary young musicians who showcase exceptional talent and artistry.

news.headline: Jason Ring is the new Chief Revenue Officer of TravelNet Solutions, known for Track Property Management Software.
news.summary: In Cottage Grove, Minnesota on March 20, 2025, TravelNet Solutions (TNS), the company behind Track Property Management Software, has welcomed Jason Ring to their executive leadership team as the new Chief Revenue Officer. Ring brings a wealth of sales and business expertise to the role.

news.headline: UK rate futures show 43 basis points of Bank of England rate cuts by the end of 2025 vs 52 bps before the BoE MPC announcement.
Army & Air Force Exchange Service now offers Amazon returns & pickups at PXs, BXs starting March 20, 2025.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Dallas, Army & Air Force Exchange Service customers received convenient benefits as the Exchange teamed up with Amazon. The collaboration allows Amazon customers to access package pickup and hassle-free returns at Exchange PX or BX locations. This new service enhancement facilitates a smoother shopping experience for customers, with the potential to impact a significant number of individuals utilizing these services in the future.

news.headline: Stagwell aims to boost 2025 ad spend in news media by 22% annually, targeting EMEA top execs who read 5 news articles daily.
news.summary: The announcement coincides with the second annual Future of News UK summit and the unveiling of research conducted among over 500 CEOs and Board Directors in EMEA. The study reveals that 89% of EMEA CEOs and Board Directors actively monitor the news, consuming an average of five articles on a daily basis. The event took place in London on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Critical Venture Partners launches $5M firm investing in student founders solving major crises to create trillion-dollar companies.
news.summary: A new company called Critical Venture Partners has been established in New York on March 20, 2025. The firm is investing $5 million to support student and recent alumni entrepreneurs in addressing significant challenges. They believe that the next generation of trillion-dollar companies will emerge from these innovative individuals.

news.headline: Home flipping activity in the U.S. declines for 2nd year, down 32%. Investment returns inch upward but profits remain low.
news.summary: Investor flipping activity has declined for the second consecutive year, with a notable 32% decrease during this period. Although investment returns have slightly increased, they remain close to the lowest point of the past decade. Nearly 60% of flipped homes were acquired using cash. These findings were reported from Irvine, California, on March 20, 2025, by ATTOM, a prominent organization.

New Political Trade Reported: US TREASURY BILLS - Buy - undisclosed - $100,001 - $250,000 -  - Marjorie Taylor 
 transaction date: 2025-03-17

Freddie Mac reports minimal change in mortgage rates, with 30-year fixed-rate mortgage averaging 6.67% on March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Freddie Mac, located in McLean, Virginia, shared the findings of its Primary Mortgage Market Survey® on March 20, 2025. According to the report, the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) had an average of 6.67%.

news.headline: US 30-year fixed rate mortgages 6.67% March 20th week vs 6.65% prior week - Freddie Mac.
Dow Jones rises, Nvidia gains, China stocks fall. Cathie Wood picks beaten-down stocks. Live coverage.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones experienced a decline in the stock market, whereas Nvidia saw an increase. China stocks also dropped amidst this fluctuation. Notably, Cathie Wood chose to invest in more undervalued stocks. The Dow Jones showed a modest rise, while Nvidia's stocks performed well. Concurrently, there was a dip in China's stock market. Cathie Wood strategically acquired shares of beaten-down companies, showcasing confidence in their potential for growth.

news.headline: Wood Partners builds new 304-unit upscale community in Lehi, Salt Lake City, expanding living options in fast-growing suburb.
news.summary: Today, a prominent multifamily developer has begun construction on a new community in a rapidly expanding suburb of Salt Lake City. Wood Partners, a national developer, revealed the commencement of building on Alta Vista. The project will consist of 304 units and is classified as Class-A multifamily development in Lehi.

news.headline: REDCON1 partners with Road Ranger to expand distribution of 16oz Energy drinks in US Central Region.
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida on March 20, 2025, REDCON1, a prominent player in the Sports Nutrition and Energy drink industry, has revealed an exciting new collaboration. They have joined forces with Road Ranger, a well-known convenience store chain, to enhance the availability of their 16oz Energy drinks, TOTAL. This partnership aims to broaden the reach of REDCON1's products, providing more consumers with access to their energy drinks through Road Ranger stores.

news.headline: Darden Restaurants CEO predicts continued consumer spending despite challenging environment, reports profitable sales growth in Q3.
news.summary: In March, consumer confidence took a significant hit due to soaring inflation expectations and tariff-related uncertainties in the U.S. However, CEO Rick Cardenas of Darden Restaurants (NYSE:DRI) reported that consumer spending on dining out remained strong. Darden Restaurants released their third-quarter earnings report, showing profitable sales growth. Surprisingly, the company's fiscal 2025 sales guidance surpassed analysts' projections, despite ongoing inflation challenges and economic worries. The full news article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ZEEKR stock falls as Q4 revenue hits $3.12 billion, missing estimates. Vehicle deliveries up 99.8% Y/Y.
news.summary: Shares of ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited (NYSE:ZK) experienced a decline in trading on Thursday following the release of their fiscal fourth-quarter financial results. The company announced revenue of 22.78 billion Chinese Yuan, reflecting a 39.2% year-on-year increase. In USD, the revenue was $3.12 billion, falling short of the analyst consensus of $3.18 billion. Total vehicle deliveries for the quarter reached 79,250 units, marking a substantial 99.8% increase from the previous year. Following the acquisition of Lynk & Co, the company delivered 31,277 vehicles in February 2025, comprising 14,039 Zeekr brand vehicles and 17,238 Lynk & Co brand vehicles. Vehicle sales for the quarter amounted to 19.30 billion Chinese Yuan ($2.64 billion), showing an 82.2% year-on-year growth driven by increased new product deliveries. The vehicle margin climbed to 17.3%.

news.headline: Chisholm-led group acquires Boston Celtics for $6.1B.
